Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q bleed is oppressive. Your W shield and tankiness help. Trade with Q poke.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q outer ring bleed — walk at him to avoid. Your W shields damage.
Darius.early_game: Darius dominates early. Use W to shield. Don't extend far.
Darius.mid_game: Your tankiness and W scale. His ult is deadly — avoid low HP.
Darius.late_game: You outscale through tankiness and CC. He struggles vs grouped.
Darius.win_condition: Use W to shield. Scale into tankiness. Group for fights.
Darius.scaling: You outscale through tankiness and CC.
Darius.positioning: Use W defensively. Trade Q poke. Teamfight grouped.

Garen.trading_pattern: Garen Q silence dominates close. Your W shield negates it. Trade with Q poke.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: His Q silence wind-up — move away. Your W shields damage.
Garen.early_game: Trade with Q poke. Use W to shield. He scales but you do too.
Garen.mid_game: Both scale into tankiness. Your W is useful. Trade around cooldowns.
Garen.win_condition: Trade Q poke early. Use W to shield. Group for fights.
Garen.positioning: Trade Q poke. Use W defensively. Teamfight grouped.

Fiora.early_game: Fiora's parry is oppressive. Trade Q from range only.
Fiora.mid_game: Your tankiness scales. Her split push is strong. Group for fights.
Fiora.late_game: You outscale through tankiness. Fiora struggles grouped.
Fiora.win_condition: Trade Q from range. Use W to shield. Group for fights.
Fiora.positioning: Trade Q from range. Use W defensively. Group for fights.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Nasus has zero early game. Your Q poke and W shield dominate. Trade aggressively.
Nasus.ability_to_dodge: His W wither — use W to shield or trade back.
Nasus.early_game: Dominate with Q poke. Nasus is helpless. Build a lead.
Nasus.mid_game: Your lead carries. His stacking helps. Group for fights.
Nasus.late_game: His stacks scale. You outscale through tankiness. Group always.

Nasus.scaling: He outscales through stacks — you through tankiness.
